scripts.test: docker run --rm --network host -e COREPACK_ENABLE_DOWNLOAD_PROMPT=0 -v $(pwd):/work/ -v /work/node_modules -w /work/ -it mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.60.0-noble /bin/bash -c 'corepack enable && pnpm i && pnpm exec playwright test'
scripts.test:update: docker run --rm --network host -e COREPACK_ENABLE_DOWNLOAD_PROMPT=0 -v $(pwd):/work/ -v /work/node_modules -w /work/ -it mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.57.0-noble /bin/bash -c 'corepack enable && pnpm i && pnpm exec playwright test --update-snapshots'
